errors.INAPPROPRIATE_CONTENT: Your comment contains inappropriate content. Please edit it before posting.

premiumActivated.body: Your Premium plan is active until {when}. Analytics is now unlocked.

reminders.title: Reminder console
reminders.subtitle: Trigger the reminder cron tick manually and review the recent log.
reminders.helper: "Run now" honors per-user reminderHours and smsEnabled. "Run with force" widens the window to 7 days and ignores user opt-outs — useful for demos.

booking.title: Book an appointment

service.title: Pick a service

service.noServices: This professional offers no services right now.

summary.title: Confirm your booking
summary.subtitle: Check the details and confirm.
summary.holdLabel: We're holding this slot for you until {until}.

booking.confirmedSubtitle: We've sent you a notification. Find this in My Appointments.

errors.SLOT_TAKEN: Another customer just took this slot. Please pick a different time.
errors.HOLD_GONE: Your tentative hold expired. Please pick the time again.
errors.RANGE_TOO_LARGE: Range too large. Try fewer days.

detail.cancelBody: The slot reopens for booking. We'll let the professional know.
detail.cancelDeadlinePassedBody: You can't cancel through the app anymore. Please contact the professional directly.
detail.rescheduleSubtitle: Pick a new time for your appointment.

errors.CANCEL_DEADLINE_PASSED: The cancellation deadline has passed. Please contact the professional directly.
errors.NOT_CONFIRMED: This appointment isn't in a confirmed state.
errors.SLOT_TAKEN: Another customer just took that slot. Pick a different time.
